arguments.argument:
if view_current=0 { displayX=view_xview[0]+240 displayY=view_yview[0]+144 draw_sprite_ext(sprite_index,0,displayX,displayY,1,1,0,image_blend,image_alpha) draw_set_halign(fa_center) draw_set_alpha(image_alpha) draw_set_color(myColor) draw_set_font(fnt_GameOver) draw_text(displayX,displayY-18,myLevel)
dispTime-=1*gDeltaTime if dispTime<=0 { image_alpha-=0.04 if image_alpha<=0 {instance_destroy()} } }
